notes: 3.11.53 — Giam thao tac Phe duyet (Sep): (1) Nut '⚡ Trinh thang L2 (bo L1)' tai chip Cho KT kiem — KT kiem xong day thang pending_l2, L2 duyet 1 chu ky thay 2; ham wfCheckAccSkipL1 rieng, audit 'check_acc_skip_l1', co _skipL1 + badge tren card; SOD L2 giu nguyen (nguoi tao khong tu duyet).
